abilities.name: Inspirational Defiance
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Breacher Team^^**
- **^^Kroot Carnivores^^**
- **^^Strike Team^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Duality Shield
abilities.text: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Paradox of Duality
abilities.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Supreme Loyalty (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)

abilities.name: Broadside Battlesuit
abilities.text: **^^Battlesuit Veteran^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 10. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Vehicle^^** and **^^Walker^^** keywords, and remove the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities. It can be equipped with up to three ranged weapons, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Broadside Battlesuits^^**.

abilities.name: Kalamandra
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 5+, its Wounds characteristic to 6, and it is equipped with 1 kalamandra's bite in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Mounted^^** keyword and it gains the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Krootox
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. Change this model's Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 5+ and its Wounds characteristic to 7, and it is equipped with 1 Rampager fists in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Mounted^^** keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Krootox Rampagers^^**, **^^Krootox Riders^^**.

abilities.name: Veteran Scout
abilities.text: **^^Shas'nel^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 7", it gains the Scouts 7" ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Pathfinder Team^^**.

abilities.name: Ritual Butchery
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Fire and Fade
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Cunning Ambush
abilities.text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly **^^T'au Empire^^** unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Warrior Bond
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^T'au Empire^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Fire Discipline
abilities.text: Each time this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Breach and Clear
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: DS8 Support Turret
abilities.text:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abilities.name: Advanced Armour
abilities.text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Volley Fire
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Crack Shot
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

- **^^Strike Team^^**

abilities.text: If a **^^Character^^** unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **^^Crisis Fireknife Battlesuit^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Fireknife
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Starscythe
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack (excluding attacks that target MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Sunforge
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Pathfinder Team^^**

abilities.name: Rapid Deployment
abilities.text: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Sentinel Protocols
abilities.text: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Fortifications**^^ from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Coordinated Leadership
abilities.text: In your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Stealth Drones
abilities.text:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: While a friendly KROOT unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Targeting Array
abilities.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: Drone Escort
abilities.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.text: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Rites of Feasting
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel Not Pain 6+ ability. If that unit destroys one or more enemy units in the Fight phase, until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

abilities.name: Ritual Butchery
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Loping Pounce
abilities.text: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly KROOT INFANTRY units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.text: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT CHARACTER models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

abilities.name: Fire and Fade
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Advanced Scouting
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Kroot Ambush
abilities.text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly KROOT unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Trail Finding
abilities.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model's unit, if this model's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: War Leader
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Kroot Linebreakers
abilities.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Kroot Packmates
abilities.text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Armour Hunter
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Targeting Array
abilities.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: Aggressive Deployment
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Air Caste Colossus
abilities.text: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-20 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Jet Pack Insertion
abilities.text: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this TRANSPORT can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-9 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Target Uploaded
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Fortifications**^^ from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Nova Charge
abilities.text: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by this model. Until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Battlesuit Support System
abilities.text: The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back, but when doing so only models equipped with this wargear can make ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Weapon Support System
abilities.text: Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Volley Fire
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Breacher Team^^**
- **^^Strike Team^^**

abilities.name: Broadside Battlesuit
abilities.text: **^^Battlesuit Veteran^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 10. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Vehicle^^** and **^^Walker^^** keywords, and remove the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities. It can be equipped with up to three ranged weapons, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Broadside Battlesuits^^**.

abilities.name: Kalamandra
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 5+, its Wounds characteristic to 6, and it is equipped with 1 kalamandra's bite in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Mounted^^** keyword and it gains the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Krootox
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. Change this model's Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 5+ and its Wounds characteristic to 7, and it is equipped with 1 Rampager fists in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Mounted^^** keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Krootox Rampagers^^**, **^^Krootox Riders^^**.

abilities.name: Veteran Scout
abilities.text: **^^Shas'nel^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 7", it gains the Scouts 7" ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Pathfinder Team^^**.

abilities.name: Ritual Butchery
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Fire and Fade
abilities.text: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Cunning Ambush
abilities.text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly **^^T'au Empire^^** unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Warrior Bond
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^T'au Empire^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Fire Discipline
abilities.text: Each time this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Eclipse Field Generator
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Assassin
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^XV9 Hazard Battlesuits^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Blacklight Marker Drones
abilities.text:
Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
**Designer’s Note:** *Place two Blacklight Marker Drone tokens next to this model, removing one each time this ability has been used.*

profiles.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

abilities.name: Velocity Tracker
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack with a ranged weapon that targets a unit that can FLY, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Targeting Array
abilities.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: Forward Observers
abilities.text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Heavy Walker
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Support System
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titan-killer
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Suppression Volley
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: DS8 Support Turret
abilities.text:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abilities.name: Pulse Bombs
abilities.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Coordinated Strike
abilities.text: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Super-Heavy Walker
abilities.text: Each time a model with this ability makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **^^Titanic^^** models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: High-intensity Markerlights
abilities.text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a model in its Guided unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Neocapacitor Shields
abilities.text: At the start of your opponent’s Charge phase, you can select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster^^** and **^^Vehicle^^** units) within 12" of this unit. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, until the end of the turn, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Exemplars of Mont’ka
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

abilities.name: Retro-thrusters
abilities.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can either make a Normal move of up to 6" or a Fall Back move.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Droneport
abilities.text: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Fortifications**^^ from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Tidewall Cover
abilities.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Tidewall Defence Platform
abilities.text: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

abilities.name: Strafing Run
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport bay
abilities.text: The bearer has the TRANSPORT keyword and has a transport capacity of 12 TACTICAL DRONES models.

abilities.name: Outflank
abilities.text: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

abilities.name: Airborne Agility
abilities.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

models.name: Vespid Stingwings w/ Neutron Grenade Launcher
Vespid Stingwings w/ Neutron Rail Rifle

abilities.name: Photon Casters
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Nova Burst
abilities.text: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.
